topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into SIEM & Monitoring. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Cybersecurity Analyst roles.
whyItMatters: SIEM & Monitoring is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
